source_section.title_label_raw: Landscape Plan Requirements Requirement to Submit a Landscape Plan

sections.title_label_raw: Plan Requirements Requirement to Submit a Landscape Plan

provisions.heading_context_raw: Plan Requirements Requirement to Submit a Landscape Plan
provisions.text: When required under Section 10, a development permit application shall include a landscape plan stamped and signed by a landscape architect, certifying that the plan meets the minimum requirements of this By-law.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Plan Requirements Requirement to Submit a Landscape Plan
provisions.text: The landscape plan shall depict the design of all hard landscaping or soft landscaping required for the development, and where applicable shall indicate:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Plan Requirements Requirement to Submit a Landscape Plan
provisions.text: the current and proposed site topography, including the location of any significant gradients;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Plan Requirements Requirement to Submit a Landscape Plan
provisions.text: the footprints of all existing and proposed buildings, including underground parking structures;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Plan Requirements Requirement to Submit a Landscape Plan
provisions.text: the planting areas and details for all new vegetation and groundcover, including location, quantity, size, and both the common and botanical names that identify the species and variety;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Plan Requirements Requirement to Submit a Landscape Plan
provisions.text: the location and identification of existing vegetation that will be used to meet the requirements of Section 414;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Plan Requirements Requirement to Submit a Landscape Plan
provisions.text: the soft landscaping on any flat roof, as per the requirements of Section 418;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Plan Requirements Requirement to Submit a Landscape Plan
provisions.text: the soft landscaping on the roof slab of any underground parking structure, as per the requirements of Section 419;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Plan Requirements Requirement to Submit a Landscape Plan
provisions.text: the protection measures, such as hoardings, for any existing soft landscaping that is to be maintained;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Plan Requirements Requirement to Submit a Landscape Plan
provisions.text: the construction details for all hard-landscaped areas, including design specifications, dimensions, paving materials, and locations;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Plan Requirements Requirement to Submit a Landscape Plan
provisions.text: the manufacturers' specifications, such as model and colour, for all seating, light standards and fixtures, waste receptacles, bicycle parking racks, roofed bicycle cages, enclosed bicycle lockers, tree grates or guards, bollards, planter seating walls, wood arbours, outdoor furniture, solid waste management area enclosures, railings, and fencing; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Plan Requirements Requirement to Submit a Landscape Plan
provisions.text: any other information that the Development Officer requires to determine if the development complies with this By-law.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Plan Requirements Requirement to Submit a Landscape Plan
provisions.text: All soft landscaping specified on a landscape plan shall comply with the latest edition of the Canadian Landscape Standard. Off-Street Loading
